revision.content:
These are notes for the first and second Makeventions held (2013 & 2014)


= Makevention 2014=
== Communication ==
* [http://www.makevention.org/ Website]
* [http://www.makevention.org/mailman/listinfo/exhibitors Exhibitors mailing list]
* [http://www.makevention.org/mailman/listinfo/volunteers Volunteers mailing list]
* [http://www.makevention.org/mailman/listinfo/committee Committee mailing list]
* [http://harold.uits.indiana.edu/Makevention/ExhibitorApplication/ExhibitorApplication.php Exhibitor Application]
* Facebook page

== Advertising ==
* [http://harold.uits.indiana.edu/~jtillots/Makevention/Makevention-2014_calling-all-makers-poster.pdf Flyer]
* [http://harold.uits.indiana.edu/~jtillots/Makevention/Makevention-Logo-2014_Facebook-and-Online.png Online logo]
* [http://harold.uits.indiana.edu/~jtillots/Makevention/Makevention-Logo-2014_High-Res-for-PRINT.jpg Print logo]
* [http://harold.uits.indiana.edu/~jtillots/Makevention/Calling-Makers_business-card_2014_WITH-DATE-01.jpg Business cards]
* Visit Bloomington is not going to advertise in markets outside of Bloomington.

== Letters of Support ==
* Library
* City
* BTP
* Wonderlab

== Current Activities ==

* Getting the word out so that people save the date
* Recruiting exhibitors
* Finishing the prospectus

== Venue ==
* Convention Center - cost $2,150
** Also use the parking lot across the B-Line and the parking lot across College
** Also use the B-Line

== Date ==
* August 30th
** Convention Center is totally open and they have us pencilled in at this time
** Same weekend as the 4th Street Art Festival
** Same weekend as an ISU (from Terre Haute)/IU home game
** Might be cool to do something with the Terre Haute Hackerspace and Rose Hulmann (I have contacts at both)

== Organizing Team ==
* Jenett Tillotson, Bloominglabs, general chair, jtillots ]at[ cogbots ]dot[ com
* Therese Miller, IU/PTI, sponsorships, millertm ]at[ iu ]dot[ com
* Steve Backs, Monroe County Public Library, stivab ]at[ gmail ]dot[ com
* Michael Hoerger, Monroe County Public Library , advertising and graphic design, michaelismichael ]at[ gmail ]dot[ com
* Marc Cheetah, Monroe County Public Library, sponsors and general stuff, marc.j.cheetah ]at[ gmail ]dot[ com
* Nathan Heald, Bloominglabs, registration and schwag, dosman ]at[ packetsniffers ]dot[ com
* Barbara Hallock, volunteer coordinator, bahalloc ]at[ iu ]dot[ edu
* Austin Toombs, Bloominglabs booth coordinator, austintoombs ]at[ googlemail ]dot[ com
* Dan Halsey, Bloominglabs, badge maker and exhibitor coordinator, dakhalsey ]at[ gmail ]dot[ com

== Possible New Exhibitors ==
* Center for Sustainable Living
** Bike Project
* LVL1, Hive13, Club Cyberia, Makerspace: Goshen
* Indiana Filmmakers Network
* Bloomington Print Collective
* Trained Eye Arts
* My Sister's Closet
* EGBG's - a Bloomington glass blowing shop
* Mother Hubbard's Cupboard
* Ivy Tech
* Crane

== Possible Events ==
* Power Wheels Race
* Circuit Bending
** Get toys from [http://www.mcswmd.org/recycling.reuseoptions.html Bloomington Reuse Center]
* Frankenstein stuffed animals
* Thursday night music event at the Bluebird
* Open houses at local makers space in Bloomington on Friday night
** Bloominglabs
** Trained Eye Arts
** Bloomington Print Collective
** Ecovillage
* Saturday night Par-Tay at Bloominglabs

== Schools ==
* MCCSC
* Hoosier Hills
* Project School
* Pinnacle School

== Entertainment ==
* [http://nerdcorenow.com/2010/09/20/album-shammers-lefthand-shmix-tape-ep/ Shammers - nerdcore group based out of Bloomington]
* Long-shot, but [http://robertdelong.com/ Robert DeLong] would be awesome.

== Possible Sponsors ==
* Pinnacle School
* Hoosier Energy
* Crane's STEM group
* PTI
* Cook
* Ivy Tech
** Entrepeneurship Institute - Steve Bryant
* Bender Lumber 
** Paul Bender - 812-339-9730 x210
* Boston Scientific in Spencer
* Cummins
* Baxter
* Herald Times (maybe in-kind advertising)
* MCPL (in-kind graphic design)
* Stansifers
* Kleindorfers
* Neff Engineering, a local 80/20 distributor
* Lowes, Menards, Radio Shack
* Bloomington Technology Partnership
** Ron Walker
** Katy Birge
* SproutBox
* Mark Krenz/SUSO
* Layne Hydro
** Vic's company

== Contacts ==
* Mike McAfee, Executive Director, Visit Bloomington, mike ]at[ visitbloomington ]dot[ com
* Laura Newton, Assistant Directory, Visit Bloomington, laura ]at[ visitbloomington ]dot[ com
* Talisha Coppock, Executive Director, Convention Center, tcoppock ]at[ bloomingtonconvention ]dot[ com
* Zoe Monts, Sales and Event Assistant, Convention Center, zoe ]at[ bloomingtonconvention ]dot[ com
* Lauren Dexter, Event Coordinator, Convention Center, lauren ]at[ bloomingtonconvention ]dot[ com

== Insurance ==
* Cost?

== Budget ==
* Venue
* Insurance
* Printing
** Flyers and posters to put up around Bloomington
** Yard signs
** Banners for the event
** Handouts/Program for the event
* Advertising
** HT ads when it gets closer to the event
** Ads in the Ryder
** Ads in the IDS
** [http://www.outdoorbillboard.com/billboards-for-rent/indiana/bloomington Billboards around Bloomington]
* T-shirts for volunteers
* 50 Makevention shirts to sell during event plus pre-sales orders and volunteer shirts / ordered 8-8
* Other Schwag?

== Income ==
* Charge vendors more ($25)
* Encourage $5 per person/$15 for families donations

== Registration handout / badges & schwag ==
* 200 lanyards with badge clips / ordered 8-8
* Wood gear laser-cut badges for $10, 100 to be made
* 500 paper badges

== Other events around the same time ==
* [http://www.indiana.edu/~sustain/programs/hoosier-to-hoosier/index.php Hoosier to Hoosier community sale]
* [http://makerfairefortwayne.com/ Fort Wayne Regional Maker Faire]
* [http://www.makerfairenashville.com/ Nashville Mini Maker Faire]
* [http://makerfairelou.org/ Louisville Mini Maker Faire]
* DerbyCon
* [https://sites.google.com/site/4thstreetfestival/ 4th Street Art Festival]
